			<tls:context >

			</kafka:bootstrap-servers>
				<kafka:additional-properties >
				<kafka:additional-property key="client.dns.lookup" value="${kafka.dnsLookup}" />
			</kafka:additional-properties>
		</kafka:producer-sasl-gssapi-connection>
	</kafka:producer-config>
	<secure-properties:config name="Secure_Properties_Config" doc:name="Secure Properties Config" doc:id="284fb297-a9cf-42c0-a14b-0e5f5b2d2508" file="properties\config-secure-${mule.env}.yaml" key="${mule.key}" />

</mule>

instruction: Create a MuleSoft 4 flow for: camunda kafka papi. The **Camunda Kafka Process API (PAPI)** is a middleware integration service that bridges the Camunda Business Process Management (BPM) engine with Apache Kafka messaging infrastructure. It enables th
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<mule xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns:error-handler-plugin="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:apikit="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit/current/mule-apikit.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd 
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin/current/mule-error-handler-plugin.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd">
   
    <flow name="camunda-kafka-papi-main">
        <http:listener config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config" path="${api.name}/api/${api.version}/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <apikit:router config-ref="camunda-kafka-papi-config" />
		<error-handler>
			<on-error-propagate enableNotifications="false" logException="false" doc:name="On Error Propagate" doc:id="3347b22f-a962-43b0-ab37-d3bef3c00639" >
				<error-handler-plugin:on-error doc:name="Process Error" doc:id="84c399a9-7237-4a58-ae54-bbe87c925e30" config-ref="Error_Handler_Plugin_Config" previousErrors="#[payload]" badRequestError='#["There was an issue with your request message." ++ error.description]' >
					<error-handler-plugin:error ><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></error-handler-plugin:error>
				</error-handler-plugin:on-error>
				<set-variable value="#[attributes.httpStatus]" doc:name="Set HTTP Status Code" doc:id="e13ef374-4409-4256-9cb3-f5b975f7190e" variableName="httpStatus" />
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Logger" doc:id="e2303b47-8099-4936-92bd-d8e4c11ecf6d" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="After Receiving Error" />
			</on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="camunda-kafka-papi-console">
        <http:listener config-ref="HTTP_Listener_config" path="/console/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers>#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]</http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body>#[payload]</http:body>
                <http:headers>#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]</http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <apikit:console config-ref="camunda-kafka-papi-config" />
        <error-handler>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_FOUND">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Resource not found"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">404</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="get:\health-check:camunda-kafka-papi-config">
		<ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message">
            <ee:message>
                <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
  "success": true,
  "apiName": "camunda-kafka-papi",
  "version": "v1",
  "correlationId": "0ce8a450-5184-11ee-97b2-005056b8487c",
  "timestamp": "2023-09-12T21:20:09.2008061+05:30",
  "data": {
    "message": "Health check for app is successful and app is up and running"
  }
}]]></ee:set-payload>
            </ee:message>
        </ee:transform>
    </flow>
    <flow name="post:\evaluate:application\json:camunda-kafka-papi-config">
		<flow-ref doc:name="Flow Reference" doc:id="2175aeb6-6f4a-4b9b-9001-d4a6fb2a9ab7" name="Camunda-Evaluate-Sub_Flow"/>
    </flow>
    <flow name="post:\submit:application\json:camunda-kafka-papi-config">
		<flow-ref doc:name="Flow Reference" doc:id="6ad8c5f6-fbe5-4021-880d-2e68e3cedfd2" name="Camunda-Submit-Sub_Flow"/>
    </flow>
    <flow name="post:\task:application\json:camunda-kafka-papi-config">
		<flow-ref doc:name="Flow Reference" doc:id="6798b6f5-7c68-4d6f-9e11-e2b4ef512e04" name="Camunda-task-Sub_Flow"/>
    </flow>
</mule>

instruction: Create a MuleSoft 4 flow for: cicd. The `enterprise-mule-cicd` project serves as the **CI/CD pipeline reference template** for Charter Communications' MuleSoft integration platform. Its primary business purpose is to: - **Standardize de

Create a MuleSoft 4 flow for: cpq kafka mda ddb netcrackerwrapper icoms changes sync app. This application serves as a critical integration bridge in the Charter Communications CPQ (Configure, Price, Quote) ecosystem. It synchronizes ICOMS (Integrated Communications Operations Management S
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:batch="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/batch" xmlns:salesforce="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce"
	xmlns:dynamodb="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/dynamodb"
	xmlns:db="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db" xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:vm="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/vm" xmlns:kafka="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/kafka" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/kafka http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/kafka/current/mule-kafka.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/vm http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/vm/current/mule-vm.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db/current/mule-db.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/dynamodb http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/dynamodb/current/mule-dynamodb.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce/current/mule-salesforce.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/batch http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/batch/current/mule-batch.xsd">
	<flow name="kafka-mda-ddb-sync-implementationFlow" doc:id="26a8b172-79b8-4e9b-8628-f185922cdd06" >
		<kafka:message-listener doc:name="Consume messages from MDA kafka topic" doc:id="48a8b835-f0ec-402c-b451-98bfc2dc9223" config-ref="Apache_Kafka_Consumer_configuration" ackMode="IMMEDIATE" parallelConsumersAmount="${kafka.consumers}" />
		<set-payload value="#[payload]" doc:name="Converting to JSON" doc:id="5309a9b4-1c27-49ca-9813-62b5c2d648bf" mimeType="application/json" />
		<ee:transform doc:name="var originalPayload" doc:id="59108779-ab1e-4267-bd63-3ed108b0cf9b">
			<ee:message>
			</ee:message>
			<ee:variables>
				<ee:set-variable resource="dwl/v_originalPayload.dwl" variableName="originalPayload" />
			</ee:variables>
		</ee:transform>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log the Kafka payload" doc:id="1f9cedd4-7ab4-4f6c-8e6c-3f768f2b6d78" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Logging the Kafka Payload."/>
		<until-successful maxRetries="3" doc:name="Until Successful" doc:id="daf29a9f-1182-4435-91dd-2014226a229f" millisBetweenRetries="2000">
			<dynamodb:scan tableName="#[p('dynamoDB.cpq.tableName')]" doc:name="fetch data" doc:id="185afb0a-2d69-4bbb-956f-408d79b898e0" config-ref="Amazon_DynamoDB_Configuration" select="ALL_ATTRIBUTES" filterExpression="icomsServiceLocationId=:icomsServiceLocationId AND salesforceStatus=:salesforceStatus AND wapiStatus=:wapiStatus">
				<dynamodb:attribute-values>
					<dynamodb:attribute-value key=":icomsServiceLocationId" value='#[{"S": payload.accountNumber}]' />
					<dynamodb:attribute-value key=":salesforceStatus" value='#[{"S":"NOT_STARTED"}]' />
					<dynamodb:attribute-value key=":wapiStatus" value='#[{"S":"NOT_STARTED"}]' />
				</dynamodb:attribute-values>
			</dynamodb:scan>
		</until-successful>
		<ee:transform doc:name="json payload" doc:id="e68befa2-7ba1-4150-94ac-4c253c7e31d9">
				<ee:message>
					<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/p_payload_json.dwl" />
				</ee:message>
			</ee:transform>
		<choice doc:name="Choice" doc:id="e4966740-0db0-4705-a8d5-1984ae541510" >
			<when expression="#[sizeOf(payload.items) == 0]">
				<ee:transform doc:name="ddb insert data" doc:id="8d5339bd-3420-4c3e-a0bd-5c6b13f232f9">
				<ee:message>
						<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/p_ddb_insert_data.dwl" />
				</ee:message>
			</ee:transform>
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="dynamoDB request logger" doc:id="561f06a9-6dde-4a4d-8b4a-1e86667a704e" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Before insert into dynamoDB" tracePoint="BEFORE_REQUEST" />
				<until-successful maxRetries="3" doc:name="Until Successful" doc:id="d2e6e500-05e9-426a-a66b-039d369e0bd0" millisBetweenRetries="2000">
					<dynamodb:put-item doc:name="insert into dynamoDB table" doc:id="f1fef97a-93e9-4a87-9025-0daec520fdfb" config-ref="Amazon_DynamoDB_Configuration" tableName="#[p('dynamoDB.cpq.tableName')]" />
				</until-successful>
				<ee:transform doc:name="response" doc:id="bc5643db-b392-442a-aefa-785f372c6801">
					<ee:message>
						<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/p_payload_json.dwl" />
					</ee:message>
				</ee:transform>
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="dynamoDB response logger" doc:id="444af71f-01fa-43f6-92e7-9a405a71df29" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="After insert into dynamoDB" tracePoint="AFTER_REQUEST" />
			</when>
			<otherwise >
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Logger" doc:id="90cf551e-a0ed-4219-bd6a-0c20e1d6b480" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="account is already exist">
					</json-logger:logger>
			</otherwise>
		</choice>
	</flow>
</mule>
